modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Applications affected by my username change after name change.

full_description_text: I changed my name and now I’m worried about my apps. Like, will my login still work for Exchange and RapidIdentity? I also use Cisco VoIP phone, so I need to know if that’s okay too. What will happen to everything after my name change?
short_description: Applications affected by my username change after name change.
description: I changed my name and now I’m worried about my apps. Like, will my login still work for Exchange and RapidIdentity? I also use Cisco VoIP phone, so I need to know if that’s okay too. What will happen to everything after my name change?
